info.title: Bryn Control Plane API
info.description:
Tenant-scoped REST API for the Bryn Control Plane, authenticated with Civic Auth bearer tokens.

The JWT identifies the caller, not the tenant. The API resolves the active tenant from the caller's memberships: with a single membership the tenant is implicit; with more than one, send an `X-Bryn-Tenant: <tenantId>` header naming one of them.

get.summary: Onboarding checklist for the authenticated tenant
Resumable pixel-install payload for the authenticated tenant

post.summary: Provision (or re-read) the tenant's PostHog webhook destination config

get.summary: Onboarding step state for the authenticated tenant

200.description: Updated onboarding state (also returned idempotently on a repeat completion)

403.description: The caller's role does not permit completing onboarding steps (owner-only)

409.description: Predecessor step incomplete (step_locked) or the live gate is unmet (gate_failed)

post.summary: Start a new isolated onboarding session

404.description: No such session in the caller's tenant

get.summary: List the Windmill flows the Plays step offers as toggleable Plays

200.description: The available Plays catalogue (live Windmill flows under f/bryn_<env>)

503.description: The Plays catalogue source is unavailable

patch.summary: Merge a partial config draft into the session

200.description: The session with the merged draft

404.description: No such session in the caller's tenant

409.description: The session is committed/abandoned and no longer editable

post.summary: Mark a session step complete and stage its payload

200.description: The session with the step stamped and its payload staged

404.description: No such session in the caller's tenant

409.description: The session is committed/abandoned and no longer editable

post.summary: Commit a session's draft to live config and go live

200.description: The committed session (also returned idempotently when the session is already committed)

400.description: The draft is missing required config (incomplete_draft)

403.description: The caller's role does not permit committing (owner-only)

404.description: No such session in the caller's tenant

409.description: The session cannot be committed (abandoned) or the firing-ready gate is unmet (gate_failed)

get.summary: Current user and their tenant memberships

202.description: Accepted; processing queued (or a replay of an already-open request)

409.description: A concurrent submit opened a request for this subject

get.summary: Get a PlayExecution's live flow graph

404.description: PlayExecution or workflow run not found

get.summary: Get a PlayExecution's per-step wall-clock timing

404.description: PlayExecution or workflow run not found

post.summary: Release a held PlayExecution early (operator hold-release)

200.description: Released early, or a safe no-op when the run was no longer held

409.description: Hold has no stored resume URL — not releasable from the Control Plane

502.description: The Workflow Engine could not be reached or rejected the release

get.summary: Observed-event sample for the Signal Mapping step
List currently engaged kill switches for the tenant

400.description: Validation error (e.g. unsupported axis at v0)

409.description: A kill switch for this scope is already engaged

get.summary: Get an Entity (with drill-through to recent Signals)
List the canonical industry vocabulary (LinkedIn Industry Codes V2)

post.summary: Add origins to the tenant's pixel-origin allowlist (atomic union)
Rotate the tenant's webhook signing secret

get.summary: List the output integrations available to connect

post.summary: Mint the Slack consent URL for this tenant

get.summary: List the connected workspace's public channels

post.summary: Persist a chosen Slack channel as an output connection
Create a credential-less output connection (e.g. dashboard)
Verify an output connection by delivering a test message
